summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. The Footer.tsx now uses a Google Maps search URL for Margao, South Goa opening in a new tab, and Services.tsx includes a VastuCertificates component with certificate photo display and fallback to static assets. No missing requirements were identified.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-only hover-to-upload and remove controls for certificate photos directly on the Services page (VastuCertificates component with Upload/Trash2 icons and backend mutation logic)
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only asked to replace placeholder div elements with img elements or clearly labeled placeholder img tags. It did not request admin upload/delete functionality on the Services page. The diff summary explicitly mentions admin-only hover-to-upload and remove controls, which goes beyond the stated requirement.
